description_long: This object depicts a human jogger with a highly stylized, abstract form dominated by sharp, angular black shapes that envelop and obscure most of the body. The only clearly visible human features are the head, which has short gray hair, and a hand protruding from the angular mass. The rest of the figure is encased in glossy, jet-black geometric planes that extend outward, creating a dramatic, almost wing-like silhouette. The surfaces are highly reflective, giving the object a sleek, futuristic appearance. The jogger's posture is difficult to discern due to the overwhelming abstraction, but the head and hand suggest a forward-facing orientation. The overall impression is of a dynamic, motion-inspired sculpture rather than a realistic human figure.
description: A highly abstract jogger figure encased in glossy, angular black shapes, with only the head and hand visible. The form is dramatic and futuristic, with sharp, reflective surfaces.
description_view_0: From this view, the jogger's head and hand are visible beneath intersecting black angular planes, emphasizing the enveloping, wing-like structure.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the elongated, sharp black forms extending outward, with minimal human features visible and a focus on the abstract geometry.
description_view_2: The back view shows the jogger's head peeking above the angular mass, with the geometric planes forming a wide, dramatic silhouette.
description_view_3: Another side view, emphasizing the length and sharpness of the black shapes, with the human form almost entirely obscured except for a small hand and part of the head.
attribute_clothing_type: The jogger appears to be enveloped in a fitted, glossy, black synthetic suit with angular, sculptural extensions, obscuring any traditional garment details.
attribute_footwear_type: Footwear is not visible due to the abstract, enveloping structure.
attribute_running_posture: The jogger's posture is mostly obscured, but the head is upright and facing forward, with one hand extended, suggesting a forward motion; the rest of the body is hidden within the angular forms.
